terms.source: Build practical AI skills for work
terms.target: 建立工作所需的實用 AI 技能
terms.note: AI-drafted term rendering from OpenAI Academy and OpenAI developer documentation; pending X translation cross-check and community review.

terms.source: Learn the fundamentals of AI, large language models, and ChatGPT through hands-on practice.
terms.target: 透過動手實作學習 AI、大型語言模型和 ChatGPT 的基礎知識。
terms.note: AI-drafted term rendering from OpenAI Academy and OpenAI developer documentation; pending X translation cross-check and community review.

terms.source: This course is designed for people who are new to AI or want a stronger foundation for using AI effectively at work.
terms.target: 本課程適合 AI 新手，或希望為在工作中有效使用 AI 打下更穩固基礎的人。

terms.source: Practice deciding what to delegate to AI while staying in control of the final work.
terms.target: 練習判斷哪些工作可以交給 AI，同時掌控最終成果。
